jobs.title: YouTube Video Producer (Senior Coordinator)

jobs.blurb: Write, shoot, and edit promotional/community spots and social ads for Telemundo Charlotte on Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Photoshop. Note: role also handles Spanish-language news promotion content. Verified open on CMG's live careers site.

jobs.title: Senior Producer, Production Operations
jobs.blurb: A stretch role — wants 7+ years and leans heavily into camera/equipment management and digital-asset archiving rather than editing. Worth a look given the Panthers/NASCAR broadcast overlap, but the experience bar is above Brendan's current 5 years. Verified open on TeamWork Online.

Good option if Brendan wants to broaden beyond pure editing. Verified open on Indeed; link goes to DNP's Indeed jobs page since the direct post uses a rotating tracking link — search "Content Creator and Campaign Specialist."

Worth knowing about, but treat the pay as variable. Verified open on Indeed. Must be 21+ (venue is a bar).

Primary media contact for men's basketball, men's and women's golf, and men's soccer at a D1 ASUN school, plus overseeing a small creative-content staff; wants AP Style, strong writing, with photography/videography/video editing listed as preferred. Brendan's journalism-degree and AP-Style background fit, but his student experience was the newspaper's sports desk rather than an athletics communications office specifically, and the years bar is well above his professional tenure.
